---
title: Recipes
description: End-to-end patterns for common dWallet flows.
---

import { Card, Cards } from 'fumadocs-ui/components/card';
import { Bitcoin, Shield, Upload, Hourglass, Users } from 'lucide-react';

Full walkthroughs that pull from every other section. Each recipe
builds something complete enough to learn from but small enough to
read in one sitting.

<Cards>
	<Card
		icon={<Bitcoin />}
		title="Shared dWallet to Bitcoin"
		description="The canonical create-sign-broadcast flow. The network signs autonomously once the dWallet capability authorizes a message."
		href="./shared-bitcoin"
	/>
	<Card
		icon={<Shield />}
		title="Zero-trust dWallet to Ethereum"
		description="Same flow with an encrypted user share, so the network cannot sign without the user actively participating."
		href="./zero-trust-ethereum"
	/>
	<Card
		icon={<Upload />}
		title="Imported-key migration"
		description="Bring an existing private key into Ika as either a shared or encrypted dWallet. The original key can be discarded."
		href="./imported-key-migration"
	/>
	<Card
		icon={<Hourglass />}
		title="Future-sign with a Move multisig"
		description="Commit to a signature now, release it later only when a Move contract grants approval. Phase-1 + Phase-2 wiring."
		href="./future-sign-multisig"
	/>
	<Card
		icon={<Users />}
		title="Backend funds DKG, user signs"
		description="Split who pays for DKG from who controls the dWallet. withSigner + capRecipient pattern for sponsored onboarding."
		href="./backend-funds-user-signs"
	/>
</Cards>

The shorter [Quickstart](../../learn/quickstart) tutorial is also
worth keeping open while you read through these.
